# JSValueProtect(_:_:)

**Function**

Protects a JavaScript value from garbage collection.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSValueProtect(_ ctx: JSContextRef!, _ value: JSValueRef!)
```

## Parameters

- **ctx**: The execution context to use.
- **value**: The [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] to protect.

## Discussion

Use this method when you want to store a [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] in a global or on the heap, where the garbage collector can’t discover your reference to it.

You can protect a value multiple times and must unprotect it an equal number of times before it becomes eligible for garbage collection.

## Supporting Garbage Collection

- **JSValueUnprotect(_:_:)**: Unprotects a JavaScript value from garbage collection.
